smoke.tagline: Last Man Standing — pick one team per round, survive to win.

hero.eyebrow: Last man standing - World Cup Edition
hero.headingLine2: Last Man Standing Wins It All.
hero.lead: Join a pool, pick a winner each round, and never use the same team twice. If your team loses or draws, you're out. Last one standing takes the prize.
hero.rakeExplanation: {{prizePoolEur}} goes to prize pool, {{rakeEur}} is admin rake.

howItWorks.title: Understand the Game in
howItWorks.card1Text: Each round, choose one team you think will win. If they win, you survive to the next round.
howItWorks.card2Title: You CAN NOT pick the Same Team Twice
howItWorks.card2Text: Once you use a team, it's gone forever. Choose wisely and save your best teams for later rounds.
howItWorks.card3Title: One wrong pick and you're out
howItWorks.card3Text: If your team loses or draws, you're eliminated. The last player standing wins the prize pool.
howItWorks.card4Text: You can see which teams are most picked and determine your strategy based on real-time statistics.

featuredPool.buyInText: Request to join this pool. Pay the admin to confirm your entry. You'll be approved once payment is received.
